heading: Criminal default
label: 3615 Criminal default
text: Whoever, having been sentenced to pay a fine, willfully fails to pay the fine, shall be fined not more than twice the amount of the unpaid balance of the fine or $10,000, whichever is greater, imprisoned not more than one year, or both.
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor prior sections 3615 to 3620, applicable to offenses committed prior to , see note set out preceding .Nov. 1, 1987section 3601 of this title

Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title
